pageContent: Name: Ravi Kant Singh Role: Senior Software Engineer Location: Gurgaon, India Contact: - Phone: +91-6396180310 - Email: howdyravi@gmail.com GitHub: github.com/raysk4ever Website: www.socialamigo.in  Professional Summary: Senior Software Engineer with experience in AI-driven systems, RAG pipelines, LangChain, LlamaIndex, frontend performance optimization, and scalable backend services. Proven expertise in building AI assistants, microservices, and high-performance web applications using React, Node.js, and cloud-native architectures.

Technical Skills: - AI & LLMs: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Prompt Engineering, AI Chatbot Development, OpenAI APIs - Frontend: React, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Material UI - Backend: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, GraphQL, WebSockets - Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase - Cloud & DevOps: AWS (Lambda, S3, Bedrock, Knowledge Base), Docker, Kubernetes, Nginx, CI/CD - Media Processing: FFmpeg - Analytics & Visualization: GCP Looker, Three.js - Others: Git, Agile Methodologies, Unit Testing, Performance Optimization

Company: EPAM Systems Inc. Location: Gurgaon, India Role: Senior Software Engineer Duration: Oct 2023 – Present  Responsibilities & Achievements: - Built internal tools to automate Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) code classification, significantly reducing manual effort and error rates. - Developed 'Classy AI Assistant', a conversational AI powered by LangChain and LlamaIndex for HTS recommendations and operational queries. - Enabled natural language workflows such as reporting, analytics, task assignments, and job re-triggering. - Implemented frontend caching and performance optimizations, reducing API latency. - Applied lazy loading and code splitting to achieve 10% performance improvement and 20% bundle size reduction.

Company: Tesit Technologies Inc. Location: Miami, Florida (Remote) Role: Software Engineer Duration: Feb 2021 – Oct 2023  Responsibilities & Achievements: - Developed Teasit.com, a Progressive Web App (PWA) with 99% Lighthouse performance and 100% SEO score using Next.js. - Designed a scalable microservice for video processing supporting 10,000+ users using FFmpeg and Node.js. - Containerized services with Docker and deployed auto-scaling infrastructure on Kubernetes. - Built an AI-based video auto-tagging system using AWS Kinesis. - Implemented core product features including Feed, In-App Video Editor, and Messenger using React. - Created custom GitHub Actions to automate CI/CD workflows.

Company: Envirya Technologies Pvt. Ltd. Location: Gurgaon, India Role: Software Engineer Duration: Aug 2019 – Feb 2021  Responsibilities & Achievements: - Built a lightweight and customizable form builder using React Native. - Led and mentored a team of 5 engineers across multiple projects. - Developed an IVRS-based system mapping users to MSMEs using pin codes. - Created background services and cron-based automation tools using Node.js, MySQL, and MongoDB.

Project Name: Classy AI Assistant Client: adidas Focus: AI-Driven Automation & Operational Intelligence  Project Details: - Designed a chat-based AI assistant to assist customs teams in accurate HTS code classification. - Implemented natural language queries for real-time reporting and classification status tracking. - Enabled operational actions such as task reassignment and job re-triggering through conversational prompts. - Improved system performance using frontend caching and lazy-loaded modules. - Reduced manual classification errors and significantly improved operational efficiency.

Project Name: Teasit Type: Progressive Web App (Video Sharing Platform)  Project Details: - Led end-to-end development of a high-performance video-sharing PWA. - Achieved industry-leading Lighthouse performance and SEO scores. - Built scalable video processing pipelines for uploads, compression, and streaming. - Integrated AI-powered video auto-tagging for enhanced searchability. - Implemented advanced features including personalized feeds, in-app video editor, and real-time messaging.

Gama AI is an enterprise-grade AI platform designed to automate workflows, enable intelligent decision-making, and provide conversational access to business data. It supports AI agents, RAG pipelines, vector search, and LLM-powered automation across multiple domains including operations, analytics, and engineering.

Gama AI capabilities include retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), semantic search using vector databases like FAISS and Qdrant, multi-agent orchestration, conversational AI interfaces, prompt-based task execution, and structured data querying. It integrates with LLMs to provide accurate, context-aware responses from internal knowledge sources.

Gama AI uses a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline where documents are chunked, embedded, and stored in a vector database. User queries are embedded and matched using semantic similarity. The most relevant chunks are retrieved and passed to the LLM to generate factual, context-aware answers.

Gama AI is used for operational intelligence, internal AI assistants, knowledge search, analytics reporting, task automation, and AI-powered recommendations. It enables users to interact with systems using natural language for querying data, generating reports, and executing workflows. Gama AI supports enterprise features such as role-based access control, secure data handling, metadata-driven retrieval, observability, audit logs, and integrations with existing systems. It is designed to operate within secure environments including private networks and VPNs. Gama AI supports enterprise features such as role-based access control, secure data handling, metadata-driven retrieval, observability, audit logs, and integrations with existing systems. It is designed to operate within secure environments including private networks and VPNs. Gama AI is optimized for performance using efficient vector indexing, caching layers, and lazy loading strategies. It supports horizontal scaling, containerized deployments, and cloud-native orchestration using Docker and Kubernetes.
Ravi prefers working on frontend-focused roles with exposure to applied AI. He enjoys building internal tools, AI assistants, and products that improve developer or business workflows.
